privileged_info_summary: I verified that the task uses real-world geographic data of the Acosta street corridor in Bologna, Italy, featuring a design speed of exactly 13.89 m/s (50 km/h) mapped directly in the SUMO net XML. I confirmed the explicit existence of 7 targeted intersection TLS IDs in the setup scenario files. Additionally, the verifier explicitly grants full credit for coordinating a minimum of 4 traffic signals and checks all requested output file paths exactly as configured.
